14: class _Graph2DState extends State<Graph2D> with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin {
15:   late AnimationController _controller;
16:   late Animation<double> _animation;
17:   bool _isPlaying = false;
18: 
19:   @override
20:   void initState() {
21:     super.initState();
22:     _controller = AnimationController(
23:       vsync: this,
24:       duration: const Duration(seconds: 3),
25:     );
26:     _animation = Tween<double>(begin: 0, end: 1).animate(_controller)
27:       ..addListener(() => setState(() {}));
28:     _controller.addStatusListener((status) {
29:       if (status == AnimationStatus.completed) {
30:         setState(() => _isPlaying = false);
31:       }
32:     });
33:   }
34: 
35:   @override
36:   void dispose() {
37:     _controller.dispose();
38:     super.dispose();
39:   }
40: 
41:   void _toggleAnimation() {
42:     if (_isPlaying) {
43:       _controller.stop();
44:     } else {
45:       if (_controller.status == AnimationStatus.completed) {
46:         _controller.reset();
47:       }
48:       _controller.forward();
49:     }
50:     setState(() => _isPlaying = !_isPlaying);
51:   }
52: 
53:   @override
54:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
55:     return Stack(
56:       children: [
57:         ListenableBuilder(
58:           listenable: widget.model,
59:           builder: (context, _) => CustomPaint(
60:             painter: _ProjectilePainter(widget.model, _animation.value),
61:             size: Size.infinite,
62:           ),
63:         ),
64:         Positioned(
65:           right: 16,
66:           top: 16,
67:           child: FloatingActionButton(
68:             mini: true,
69:             onPressed: _toggleAnimation,
70:             child: Icon(_isPlaying ? Icons.pause : Icons.play_arrow),
71:           ),
72:         ),
73:       ],
74:     );
75:   }
76: }
77: 
78: class _ProjectilePainter extends CustomPainter {
79:   final SimulationModel model;
80:   final double animationValue;
81: 
82:   _ProjectilePainter(this.model, this.animationValue);
83: 
84:   @override
85:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
86:     final paint = Paint()
87:       ..color = Colors.blue
88:       ..strokeWidth = 2
89:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke;
90: 
91:     final axisPaint = Paint()
92:       ..color = Colors.grey
93:       ..strokeWidth = 1;
94: 
95:     canvas.drawLine(
96:       Offset(0, size.height - 20),
97:       Offset(size.width, size.height - 20),
98:       axisPaint,
99:     );
100: 
101:     canvas.drawLine(
102:       Offset(20, 0),
103:       Offset(20, size.height),
104:       axisPaint,
105:     );
106: 
107:     final path = Path();
108:     final angleRad = model.angle * math.pi / 180;
109:     final v = model.velocity;
110:     final g = model.gravity;
111: 
112:     final maxRange = (v * v * math.sin(2 * angleRad)) / g;
113:     final maxHeight =
114:         (v * v * math.sin(angleRad) * math.sin(angleRad)) / (2 * g);
115: 
116:     final flightTime = 2 * v * math.sin(angleRad) / g;
117: 
118:     const padding = 40.0;
119:     final scaleX = (size.width - padding) / maxRange;
120:     final scaleY = (size.height - padding) / maxHeight;
121: 
122:     bool first = true;
123:     for (double t = 0; t <= flightTime; t += 0.01) {
124:       final x = v * math.cos(angleRad) * t;
125:       final y = v * math.sin(angleRad) * t - 0.5 * g * t * t;
126: 
127:       final screenX = 20 + x * scaleX;
128:       final screenY = size.height - 20 - y * scaleY;
129: 
130:       if (first) {
131:         path.moveTo(screenX, screenY);
132:         first = false;
133:       } else {
134:         path.lineTo(screenX, screenY);
135:       }
136:     }
137: 
138:     canvas.drawPath(path, paint);
139: 
140:     final t = flightTime * animationValue;
141:     final ballX = v * math.cos(angleRad) * t;
142:     final ballY = v * math.sin(angleRad) * t - 0.5 * g * t * t;
143: 
144:     final ballScreenX = 20 + ballX * scaleX;
145:     final ballScreenY = size.height - 20 - ballY * scaleY;
146: 
147:     final ballPaint = Paint()
148:       ..color = Colors.red
149:       ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;
150:     canvas.drawCircle(Offset(ballScreenX, ballScreenY), 8, ballPaint);
151:   }
152: 
153:   @override
154:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant _ProjectilePainter oldDelegate) {
155:     return oldDelegate.model.angle != model.angle ||
156:         oldDelegate.model.velocity != model.velocity ||
157:         oldDelegate.model.gravity != model.gravity ||
158:         oldDelegate.animationValue != animationValue;
159:   }
160: }

## Project Structure Summary

### 1. Overall Project Structure (Frontend/Backend)

This is a **Flutter (frontend) + Python Flask (backend)** application for a **Projectile Motion Simulation** with text-to-speech capabilities.

#### Frontend (`/home/tejasree/visual-task/visual-interaction/frontend/`)
- **Framework**: Flutter
- **Structure**:
  - `lib/main.dart` - App entry point
  - `lib/screens/` - App screens (simulation_screen.dart)
  - `lib/widgets/` - UI components (control_panel, graph_2d, graph_3d, view_toggle, formula_editor)
  - `lib/services/` - API and speech services
  - `lib/models/` - Data models

#### Backend (`/home/tejasree/visual-task/visual-interaction/backend/`)
- **Framework**: Python Flask
- **Structure**:
  - `app.py` - Main Flask app
  - `routes/` - API endpoints (simulation_routes.py)
  - `services/` - Business logic (speech_service, physics_service, cache_service, supabase_client)
